positive: A stylish, abstract geometric arrangement of stylized forest creatures (foxes, deer, ravens) mixed with celestial elements (moons, stars, constellations). The style should be a modern, minimalist woodcut illustration, featuring thick, bold black lines and negative space. Use a limited, earthy color palette: deep forest greens, burnt orange, cream, and charcoal black. The composition must be centered and balanced, creating a highly contrasting silhouette pattern suitable for all-over apparel printing. The entire scene should have a clean, hand-drawn, engraved aesthetic, viewed from a flat top-down perspective.
negative: text, logo, watermark, blurry, out of focus, grain, signature, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, cropped, low resolution, noise
